assertions.reason: Targeted truthsuite test confirmed replaying confirmDispatch reused the original invoice and left invoice row counts unchanged.

evidence.detail: MIGRATION_SET=v2 mvn -Djacoco.skip=true -Dtest=TS_O2CDispatchReplaySafetyTest test -> BUILD SUCCESS; test method confirmDispatchReplay_returnsExistingInvoiceWithoutCreatingDuplicateInvoices passed.

erp-domain/src/test/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/truthsuite/o2c/TS_O2CDispatchReplaySafetyTest.java:84-108 asserts replay.finalInvoiceId equals first.finalInvoiceId, invoice list size stays constant, and only one invoice matches the slip dispatch note.

erp-domain/src/main/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/sales/service/SalesCoreEngine.java:2529-2623 returns existing invoice/journal markers for already-dispatched slips instead of creating new financial records when markers are present.

assertions.reason: The replay safety suite proved AR and COGS journal references remain singletons on replay and total journal row count does not increase.

evidence.detail: MIGRATION_SET=v2 mvn -Djacoco.skip=true -Dtest=TS_O2CDispatchReplaySafetyTest test -> BUILD SUCCESS; test method confirmDispatchReplay_reusesExistingArAndCogsJournalsWithoutDuplicateReferences passed.

erp-domain/src/test/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/truthsuite/o2c/TS_O2CDispatchReplaySafetyTest.java:111-141 asserts replay reuses first.arJournalEntryId, preserves the original COGS journal id, keeps uk_journal_company_reference counts at 1, and does not add journal rows.
erp-domain/src/main/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/sales/service/SalesCoreEngine.java:2529-2623 checks for existing invoice, AR journal, and COGS journal markers and returns them on replay.

assertions.reason: Finished-goods dispatch replay short-circuited without creating new DISPATCH movements and preserved stock/reserved balances.

evidence.detail: MIGRATION_SET=v2 mvn -Djacoco.skip=true -Dtest=TS_O2CDispatchReplaySafetyTest test -> BUILD SUCCESS; test method finishedGoodsReplay_shortCircuitsWithoutCreatingDuplicateDispatchMovements passed.

erp-domain/src/test/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/truthsuite/o2c/TS_O2CDispatchReplaySafetyTest.java:144-168 asserts the replayed movement id set exactly matches the pre-replay movement id set and stock quantities remain unchanged.

erp-domain/src/main/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/inventory/service/FinishedGoodsDispatchEngine.java:107-113 returns List.of() immediately when the slip status is DISPATCHED, preventing duplicate movement creation.

assertions.reason: Ambiguous replay cases fail closed with an ApplicationException demanding manual reconciliation rather than minting another invoice.

evidence.detail: MIGRATION_SET=v2 mvn -Djacoco.skip=true -Dtest=TS_O2CDispatchReplaySafetyTest test -> BUILD SUCCESS; test method confirmDispatchReplay_failsClosedWhenMultipleInvoicesMatchSlip passed.

erp-domain/src/test/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/truthsuite/o2c/TS_O2CDispatchReplaySafetyTest.java:171-205 seeds a second matching invoice, clears slip.invoiceId, and asserts ApplicationException contains 'manual reconciliation required' with packingSlipId and slipNumber details.

erp-domain/src/main/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/sales/service/SalesCoreEngine.java:3967-3995 throws ApplicationException('Multiple invoices match dispatch slip; manual reconciliation required') when more than one invoice matches the dispatch note.

frictions: The narrow verification stayed within one truthsuite class, but Maven still recompiled the module before executing the targeted test class.
